title: What I think about Gun Control

transcript.text: Hello! This video is what I think about gun control. It's one of the hot issues, so you have to do a video. Not just me.
I'm not doing it because I'm on the high horse and I think I'm smarter than everybody.
So I need to put my video up on the internet. No, no, no, no, no.
Everybody has to get their ideas of all the political issues and philosophical issues up on the internet. Everybody.
That's how we're going to figure stuff out.
And also, that's a whole other video that I made a long time ago. That was my first video.
So what I think about gun control. I say, FREEDOM! Let everybody have guns.
Well, sorry, scratch that. Not let everybody have guns.
Generally have background checks. Don't let criminals have guns, obviously.
But let good citizens who have clean records get a gun.
Because it makes the society safer.
Some people say, oh, but if you get robbed and you pull a gun on somebody, they'll use the gun on you.
Well, that's if you're afraid to pull the trigger.
Don't pull a gun on somebody who's attacking you unless you're going to pull that trigger.
That makes the society safer.

With all of the gangs coming to America, like M13 from El Salvador and the Crips and the Bloods and the Mafia and whoever else is in America, if they start to shoot bang bang, shoot them up in the street somewhere or some guy shoots somebody or holds the store up, nobody's going to be able to do anything if you don't have a gun.
If people have guns, we can make citizens arrests and we can pull guns on the criminals.
Police officers, street cops believe that we should be allowed to carry guns.
Street cops appreciate good citizens with guns and gun training because we help them.
It's like having another cop on your side.
So, and also, we need to be able to defend ourselves in case somebody crazy gets in control of the government.
I'm not a conspiracy theorist, but it has happened before.
Lots of times before.
So it just might happen.
It could happen.
It just, but it would never happen if everybody has a gun.

If somebody gets the police force to start searching everybody's cars for drugs and try to throw everybody in jail, we could all be like, fuck you cops, whatever group of cops they are and pull guns on them and take over the street.
That's a very, very, very, very, very, very, very remote possibility though.
I just threw that M because that's another reason people use them.
I suppose anything's possible, so that's possible.
But the main reason is so we can protect ourselves with our guns.
I, one day, want to get a gun.
I want to learn how to shoot.
I want to shoot.
It's fun.
And, uh, I live in a very safe country.

But if this country were to become less safe for whatever reason, and people start robbing each other on the streets because we have some kind of economic crisis, I want to be one of the citizens who can protect.
So, gun control bad.
